entries.name: mui:theming
entries.intent: MUI theming — createTheme, palette, typography, dark mode, TypeScript augmentation, component overrides

entries.name: mui:css-variables-pigment
entries.intent: CSS Variables mode (CssVarsProvider), extendTheme, colorSchemes, Pigment CSS zero-runtime engine

entries.name: mui:sx-styled
entries.intent: MUI sx prop and styled() API — responsive values, pseudo-selectors, performance

entries.name: mui:slots-api
entries.intent: MUI slots and slotProps API for deep component customization, replacing internal elements

entries.name: mui:components
entries.intent: MUI core component patterns — inputs, display, navigation, feedback, surfaces

entries.name: mui:data-grid
entries.intent: MUI X DataGrid — columns, sorting, filtering, pagination, editing, server-side, virtualization

entries.name: mui:date-pickers
entries.intent: MUI X Date/Time Pickers — DatePicker, TimePicker, DateRangePicker, timezone, validation

entries.name: mui:charts
entries.intent: MUI X Charts — BarChart, LineChart, PieChart, composition API, custom tooltips, dual axes

entries.name: mui:tree-view
entries.intent: MUI X Tree View — SimpleTreeView, RichTreeView, lazy loading, drag-drop, virtualization

entries.name: mui:forms-validation
entries.intent: MUI forms — React Hook Form, Formik, Zod/Yup, FormControl, multi-step Stepper

entries.name: mui:layout-responsive
entries.intent: MUI layout — Grid v2, Stack, Container, Box, useMediaQuery, breakpoints

entries.name: mui:accessibility
entries.intent: MUI accessibility — ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation, WCAG compliance, color contrast

entries.name: mui:performance
entries.intent: MUI performance — tree-shaking, bundle size, sx memoization, SSR, lazy loading

entries.name: mui:ssr-nextjs
entries.intent: MUI SSR with Next.js — App Router, Pages Router, Emotion cache, RSC, Pigment CSS

entries.name: mui:animations-transitions
entries.intent: MUI transitions — Fade, Grow, Slide, Collapse, Zoom, TransitionGroup, Framer Motion

entries.name: mui:virtualization
entries.intent: MUI virtualization — react-window, react-virtuoso, virtualized Autocomplete, infinite scroll

entries.name: mui:white-label
entries.intent: MUI multi-tenant white-label — nested ThemeProvider, dynamic themes, tenant branding

entries.name: mui:base-headless
entries.intent: MUI Base headless components — useButton, useInput, useMenu hooks, Tailwind integration

entries.name: mui:joy-ui
entries.intent: Joy UI — MUI's alternative design system with CSS variables and modern aesthetics

entries.name: mui:i18n-rtl
entries.intent: MUI internationalization — RTL support, locale customization, bidirectional text

entries.name: mui:testing
entries.intent: Testing MUI components — React Testing Library, portal components, DataGrid, a11y testing

entries.name: mui:migration
entries.intent: MUI migration — v4→v5, v5→v6, codemods, makeStyles→styled/sx, breaking changes

entries.name: mui:advanced-components
entries.intent: Advanced MUI patterns — Autocomplete (async, virtualized, grouped, createFilterOptions), Stepper (non-linear, vertical, mobile), Popover, Popper, Portal, ClickAwayListener, composition
